page.content: In the Rare disease franchise, RareDrugA generated revenue of $15M with a net income of $5M, achieving a market share of 20% and a growth rate of 10%, alongside R&D spend of $2M, sales volume of 1,500 units, and an average price of $10,000, launched in Australia in 2018. RareDrugB reported revenue of $10M, net income of $3M, market share of 15%, growth rate of 8%, R&D spend of $1M, sales volume of 800 units, and an average price of $12,500, launched in New Zealand in 2017.

lines.text: In the Rare disease franchise, RareDrugA generated revenue of $15M with a net income of $5M, achieving a market share of
20% and a growth rate of 10%, alongside R&D spend of $2M, sales volume of 1,500 units, and an average price of $10,000,
launched in Australia in 2018. RareDrugB reported revenue of $10M, net income of $3M, market share of 15%, growth rate of
8%, R&D spend of $1M, sales volume of 800 units, and an average price of $12,500, launched in New Zealand in 2017.

page.content: RareDrugC, launched in Japan in 2019, achieved revenue of $20M, net income of $7M, a market share of 25%, growth rate of 12%, R&D spend of $3M, sales volume of 1,200 units, and an average price of $15,000. RareDrugD, launched in South Korea in 2020, attained revenue of $12M, net income of $4M, market share of 18%, growth rate of 9%, R&D spend of $1.5M, sales volume of 950 units, and an average price of $11,000. RareDrugE reported $5M in revenue, $1M in net income, a market share of 10%, growth rate of 5%, R&D spend of $0.5M, sales volume of 600 units, and an average price of $8,000, launched in Singapore in 2021. RareDrugF generated $8M in revenue, $2M in net income, a market share of 12%, growth rate of 6%, R&D spend of $0.8M, sales volume of 700 units, and an average price of $9,500, launched in Hong Kong in 2022. In the Oncology portfolio, Keytruda achieved $600M in sales with a market share of 15.0%, a growth rate of 40.0%, and regional performance at 30.0% in Australia. Atezolizumab reported $200M, with market share of 5.0%, growth rate of 15.0%, and regional performance at 12.0% in New Zealand.

12%, R&D spend of $3M, sales volume of 1,200 units, and an average price of $15,000. RareDrugD, launched in South Korea

Singapore in 2021. RareDrugF generated $8M in revenue, $2M in net income, a market share of 12%, growth rate of 6%, R&D
spend of $0.8M, sales volume of 700 units, and an average price of $9,500, launched in Hong Kong in 2022. In the Oncology
portfolio, Keytruda achieved $600M in sales with a market share of 15.0%, a growth rate of 40.0%, and regional performance at

at 12.0% in New Zealand.

page.content: Nivolumab generated $150M with a market share of 10.0%, growth rate of 8.0%, and regional performance at 7.0% in Singapore. Durvalumab achieved $80M, with a market share of 2.0%, growth rate of 5.0%, and regional performance at 4.0% in Japan. Trastuzumab reported $100M, with a market share of 3.0%, growth rate of 6.0%, and regional performance at 5.0% in South Korea. The total oncology portfolio reached $1.23B, with a market share of 35.0%, growth rate of 15.0%, and regional performance at 25.0% in Asia-Pacific. The Year-End Summary indicated a total of $1.5B with a 20.0% market share, 10.0% growth, and significant growth noted in overall performance.
